summary: Lock an award-grade visual identity + design-system blueprint and prioritized feature plan for Nexus v3.0

result.identityStatement: Nexus v3.0 is a precision instrument for the rack room: a calm, dense, status-first native macOS app where the health of 60 switches reads in a single glance. It is built entirely from system materials έΑΦ `.regularMaterial`/`.ultraThinMaterial` sidebars and palettes over an `NSColor.windowBackgroundColor` canvas, real vibrancy, SF Symbols, the unmistakable continuous-corner curve of system sheets έΑΦ so it disappears into macOS and only the craft remains; it never invents Electron-style custom chrome. The whole surface is near-monochrome graphite + the user's system accent, and color is rationed almost entirely to connection state, so one green pulse means "this switch is live," one amber breath means "connecting," and a single red dot pops against a wall of calm. Depth comes from layered materials and hairline (0.5έΑΥ1px) borders rather than heavy shadows; motion is fast (120έΑΥ180ms), physical, and purposeful έΑΦ a breathing status dot, a Spotlight-grade έΝαK that springs from 96% scale with a material blur-in, a dashboard that greets you instead of a blank "Welcome." A rigorous token system (one 4pt spacing grid, one radius scale, one type ramp with a dedicated tabular monospace, semantic state colors) snaps every pixel to a grid, erasing the current 8-radii / 149-font-call sprawl, and every state is encoded as color + SF Symbol so it stays colorblind-safe and award-grade while shipping in one build cycle.
result.finalTokens:
LOCKED SYSTEM έΑΦ namespace `enum DS` (DesignSystem), all values CGFloat/Color statics. Terminal NexusTheme (ANSI colors + per-session Menlo/13 font) is EXEMPT and untouched.

SPACING έΑΦ `enum DS.Space` (4pt grid): xxs=2, xs=4, sm=6, md=8, lg=12, xl=16, xxl=24, xxxl=32. Rules: row vertical padding=sm(6); row horizontal inset=lg(12); card inner padding=xl(16); Dashboard section gap=xxl(24); window/Dashboard outer margin=xxxl(32). Sidebar row height: 28 compact / 32 comfortable (user toggle, default compact). Never pass a raw number έΑΦ add `View.dsPadding(_ edges:_ token:)`. Replaces all ad-hoc .padding(8/10/12/20).

RADIUS έΑΦ `enum DS.Radius`: sm=5 (status pills, tags, key-hint chips, small buttons), md=8 (rows, tab items, list-row selection, text fields), lg=12 (cards, palette, popovers, dashboard panels), xl=16 (sheets/large modals), pill=999 (capsule state badges, segmented toggles). Collapses the 8 ad-hoc radii to 5. ALWAYS continuous: `.clipShape(.rect(cornerRadius: DS.Radius.lg, style: .continuous))`.

TYPOGRAPHY έΑΦ `enum DS.Font` (explicit pt for tabular alignment; maps to system SF). display = .system(size:20, weight:.semibold) (dashboard hero); title = .system(size:15, weight:.semibold) (sheet/panel headers); headline = .system(size:13, weight:.semibold) (section headers, selected/active row); body = .system(size:13) (primary row text, default control έΑΦ the MobaXterm-grade baseline); callout = .system(size:12) (secondary row text); caption = .system(size:11, weight:.medium) (tags, badges, metadata); mono = .system(size:11, weight:.medium, design:.monospaced).monospacedDigit() (IP/port/latency/baud έΑΦ anything tabular); eyebrow = .system(size:10, weight:.semibold) uppercased, tracking 0.5 (section eyebrows RECENT/FAVORITES). Replaces all ~149 ad-hoc .font() calls; zero literal sizes outside this enum and the terminal theme.

SEMANTIC COLORS έΑΦ `enum DS.Color`, NSColor/material-backed so light/dark + accent + increase-contrast resolve free. Surfaces: surface=Color(nsColor:.windowBackgroundColor), surfaceRaised=Color(nsColor:.controlBackgroundColor), sidebar=.ultraThinMaterial, command-surface=.regularMaterial. Content: textPrimary=Color(nsColor:.labelColor), textSecondary=.secondary, textTertiary=Color(nsColor:.tertiaryLabelColor). Lines: hairline=Color(nsColor:.separatorColor) (0.5έΑΥ1px). accent=Color.accentColor. rowHover=Color.primary.opacity(0.06), rowSelected=Color.accentColor.opacity(0.14). The `Color.black` terminal fallback at TabContentView line 121 becomes DS.Color.surface.

CONNECTION-STATE PALETTE έΑΦ the ONLY saturated color; colorblind-safe (every state = color + SF Symbol, never color alone). Resolved in Assets.xcassets with light/dark variants: stateConnected = emerald (light #248A3D / dark #34C759) + `circle.fill`; stateConnecting = amber #FF9F0A + `circle.dotted` (animated); stateFailed = rose (light #D70015 / dark #FF453A) + `exclamationmark.triangle.fill`; stateIdle = textTertiary + `circle` (hollow); stateDisconnected = textSecondary + `pause.circle.fill`. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH: because the existing `ConnectionState` enum has an associated value (`.failed(String)`) and is NOT Equatable, add an extension exposing computed `tint: Color`, `symbol: String`, and `label: LocalizedStringKey` via a switch (the `.failed` case ignores its String). TabItemView.stateColor and the new sidebar dot both read this έΑΦ kills every scattered .green/.orange/.red.

ICON SIZES έΑΦ SF Symbols only, fixed grid: statusDot=8 (sidebar inline); rowIcon=16 (protocol glyph, ALWAYS .frame(width:16) so SSH/Telnet/Serial baselines align); tabIcon=13; toolbarIcon=15; dashboardCardIcon=22; emptyStateGlyph=44 (hierarchical). Global `.symbolRenderingMode(.hierarchical)` for depth, EXCEPT status glyphs use `.palette`/default so the dot stays pure. RATIONALE: every value derives from AppKit conventions, so native-feel is satisfied by construction, the system is a few hundred lines of enums + ViewModifiers landing in one cycle, and color+symbol+label encoding satisfies HIG "don't rely on color alone."

finalComponents.name: ConnectionState (extension on existing enum)
finalComponents.api: extension ConnectionState { var tint: Color; var symbol: String; var label: LocalizedStringKey } έΑΦ switch over .idle/.connecting/.connected/.disconnected/.failed(_); the .failed case ignores its associated String. The ONLY place state colors are read.
finalComponents.purpose: Single source of truth for stateέΗΤ(color,symbol,label). Must be built FIRST; everything else depends on it. Note the enum is non-Equatable with an associated value, so this is a computed switch, not a dictionary.

finalComponents.name: StatusDot
finalComponents.api: StatusDot(state: ConnectionState, size: CGFloat = 8, animated: Bool = true) έΑΦ Circle().fill(state.tint); when .connecting && animated && !reduceMotion, a halo Circle scales 1.0έΗΤ1.6 + opacity 0.6έΗΤ0 on .easeInOut(0.9).repeatForever(autoreverses:false). .help(state.label). Honors @Environment(\.accessibilityReduceMotion).
finalComponents.purpose: Breathing live-status indicator. Used by SessionRow (leading), TabItemView, dashboard recents/cards, server panel.

finalComponents.name: StateBadge
finalComponents.api: StateBadge(state: ConnectionState, showLabel: Bool = true) έΑΦ Capsule (Radius.pill): StatusDot + optional Text(state.label) in DS.Font.caption, background state.tint.opacity(0.12), foreground state.tint. Localized DE/EN.
finalComponents.purpose: Pill state display. Tab bar, dashboard recent cards, session detail header.

finalComponents.name: KeyHint
finalComponents.api: KeyHint(_ keys: [String]) έΑΦ renders έΝα K / έΠΟ as DS.Font.mono chips, each .padding(.xs) .background(DS.Color.surfaceRaised, in: RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: DS.Radius.sm)) .overlay(stroke hairline 0.5).
finalComponents.purpose: Inline shortcut teaching. Palette footer + rows, dashboard έΝαK hint, empty-state hints.

finalComponents.name: SectionHeader
finalComponents.api: SectionHeader(_ titleKey: LocalizedStringKey, count: Int? = nil, action: (() -> Void)? = nil, actionLabel: LocalizedStringKey? = nil) έΑΦ DS.Font.eyebrow uppercased + optional count pill + optional trailing text-button.
finalComponents.purpose: Standardizes scattered section labels. Dashboard sections + sidebar group headers + palette groups.

finalComponents.name: NexusCard
finalComponents.api: NexusCard<Content: View>(padding: CGFloat = DS.Space.xl, @ViewBuilder content: () -> Content) έΑΦ content.padding(padding).background(DS.Color.surfaceRaised, in: .rect(cornerRadius: DS.Radius.lg, style:.continuous)).overlay(RoundedRectangle.strokeBorder(DS.Color.hairline, lineWidth: 1)). On hover: scale 1.0έΗΤ1.012 + shadow radius 8έΗΤ14, .spring(response:0.3, dampingFraction:0.8), gated by reduceMotion.
finalComponents.purpose: Standard panel/tile container. Every dashboard panel, server strip, empty-state container, settings group.

finalComponents.name: MonoText
finalComponents.api: MonoText(_ string: String, tint: Color = DS.Color.textSecondary) έΑΦ Text in DS.Font.mono (monospacedDigit).
finalComponents.purpose: Tabular IP/port/latency/baud so columns align vertically for fast diffing. Row trailing, cards, tab subtitle.

finalComponents.name: EmptyStateView
finalComponents.api: EmptyStateView(symbol: String, title: LocalizedStringKey, message: LocalizedStringKey, primary: (LocalizedStringKey, () -> Void)? = nil, secondary: (LocalizedStringKey, () -> Void)? = nil) έΑΦ on macOS 14+ wraps ContentUnavailableView; else centered VStack(spacing:.lg) with 44pt hierarchical glyph in accent-tinted circle, DS.Font.title title, secondary message, up to two .borderedProminent/.bordered CTAs. All strings DE/EN.
finalComponents.purpose: Replaces every blank/weak placeholder έΑΦ empty sidebar, empty search, empty recents, empty favorites, locked store. Turns dead screens into launchpads.

finalComponents.name: QuickActionTile
finalComponents.api: QuickActionTile(symbol: String, title: LocalizedStringKey, tint: Color = .accentColor, action: () -> Void) έΑΦ Button(.plain) VStack{ Image(systemName:).imageScale(.large).foregroundStyle(tint); Text(title).font(DS.Font.caption) }, ~88├Ω72, NexusCard styling, onHover lifts background to rowHover.
finalComponents.purpose: Dashboard quick-actions grid (New SSH/Telnet/Serial, Import CSV, Password Manager, Settings).

finalComponents.name: SidebarRowContent (refactor of existing SessionRow body only)
finalComponents.api: Inline refactor of SessionRow's HStack: leading StatusDot(state: vm.liveState(for: session) ?? .idle) + rowIcon(16) protocol glyph + VStack{ Text(name).font(DS.Font.body); MonoText(host) } + trailing on-hover-only play.fill/pencil ghost buttons fading in .easeOut(0.12). PRESERVES the existing `.tag(SidebarItem.session)`, List(selection:), and double-tap connect έΑΦ zero regression.
finalComponents.purpose: Status-at-a-glance sidebar without touching the List selection model. Add vm.liveState(for:) that cross-refs activeSessions by session.id/host+port.

finalComponents.name: ServerStatusPanel (stub-safe)
finalComponents.api: ServerStatusPanel() έΑΦ HStack of 3 NexusCards (TFTP/FTP/HTTP): dashboardCardIcon(22) + name + StatusDot(.idle for now) + MonoText(bound addr:port) + a .bordered Start/Stop toggle that is disabled/stubbed until servers exist. Renders 'idle' cleanly.
finalComponents.purpose: Gives the unique embedded-server feature a visible home on the Dashboard. Safe to ship before the servers are built.

finalComponents.name: CommandPaletteView + PaletteModel
finalComponents.api: CommandPaletteView(isPresented: Binding<Bool>) reading @Environment(AppViewModel.self); state in @Observable PaletteModel(vm:) { query, results:[PaletteResult], selectedIndex, scope }. PaletteResult { id, symbol, title, subtitle?, group, shortcut?, run: () -> Void }. Pure SwiftUI overlay, no AppKit required for nav.
finalComponents.purpose: έΝαK Spotlight palette. Unit-testable model; rendered as MainView .overlay.

finalComponents.name: PaletteResultRow
finalComponents.api: PaletteResultRow(result: PaletteResult, isHighlighted: Bool, query: String) έΑΦ HStack{ Image(systemName:).imageScale(.medium); VStack{ HighlightedText(result.title, match: query); if let s=result.subtitle { MonoText(s) } }; Spacer(); if let sc=result.shortcut { KeyHint(sc) } }.padding(.sm).background(isHighlighted ? DS.Color.rowSelected : .clear, in: .rect(cornerRadius: DS.Radius.md)).
finalComponents.purpose: Palette result list rows with live bolded match highlighting.

finalComponents.name: DashboardView
finalComponents.api: DashboardView() reading @Environment(AppViewModel.self); shown by TerminalTabsView when vm.activeSessions.isEmpty. ScrollView over DS.Color.surface, content max-width 920, outer margin xxxl. Cards stagger-reveal (opacity + 8pt rise, 40ms stagger, spring; gated by reduceMotion).

result.dashboardSpec:
DashboardView replaces WelcomeView inside TerminalTabsView έΑΦ exactly the existing `if vm.activeSessions.isEmpty` branch at TerminalTabsView.swift line 10έΑΥ11. When activeSessions is non-empty, the existing TabBarView + Divider + TabContentView path renders UNCHANGED έΑΦ zero regression to the working terminal. Layout: ScrollView on DS.Color.surface, content .frame(maxWidth: 920) centered, outer margin DS.Space.xxxl(32), vertical sections separated by DS.Space.xxl(24), cards stagger-reveal on appear (gated by reduceMotion).

(1) HERO / GREETING έΑΦ top. Left: DS.Font.eyebrow 'NEXUS' + time-aware DS.Font.display greeting from Calendar hour ('Good evening' / 'Guten Abend', localized) + a DS.Font.callout secondary line 'N sessions ┬╖ M folders'. Right: a full-width QUICK-CONNECT bar styled as a search field inside a NexusCard (leading magnifyingglass + placeholder 'dashboard.quickconnect.placeholder' = 'Connect to host or searchέΑο (έΝαK for everything)') with a trailing KeyHint(['έΝα','K']). Tapping it OR pressing έΝαK opens the Command Palette pre-focused (sets vm.showCommandPalette = true). One control, zero ambiguity έΑΦ no giant centered icon (the weak part of the old WelcomeView is gone).

(2) QUICK ACTIONS έΑΦ LazyVGrid(columns: adaptive(min:88)) of QuickActionTile, each wired to existing VM flags: New SSH (terminal έΗΤ showAddSession, type ssh), New Telnet (network), New Serial (cable.connector), Import CSV (square.and.arrow.down έΗΤ showImportCSV), Password Manager (key.horizontal έΗΤ showPasswordManager), Settings (gearshape). No new model needed.

(3) STATS ROW έΑΦ 3 compact NexusCards: vm.sessions.count Sessions, vm.folders.count Folders, live 'Servers running' (0 until embedded servers ship). DS.Font.display number (monospacedDigit) over DS.Font.caption secondary label. Pure derived data.

(4) RECENT SESSIONS έΑΦ SectionHeader('dashboard.recent', count:). Reads a NEW persisted `vm.recentSessionIds: [UUID]` stored in AppSettings (currently AppSettings has no such field έΑΦ add it; append session.id on vm.connect, cap 8, de-dup, move-to-front). Up to 6 rows, each: rowIcon protocol glyph + name + MonoText(host:port) + StateBadge (live state if currently in activeSessions, else .idle) + trailing play.fill on hover έΗΤ vm.connect(to:). Empty έΗΤ EmptyStateView(symbol:'clock.arrow.circlepath', title:'dashboard.recent.empty.title', message:'dashboard.recent.empty.message', primary:('action.new_session', { vm.showAddSession = true })).

(5) SERVERS PANEL έΑΦ SectionHeader('dashboard.servers') + ServerStatusPanel (the stub-safe component): 3 NexusCards for TFTP/FTP/HTTP, each StatusDot(.idle) + MonoText(addr:port) + a disabled .bordered Start/Stop toggle. Renders cleanly as 'idle' so it ships safely before the servers are built; becomes live when the server layer lands.

NOTE ON FAVORITES: proposal-3's Favorites grid requires a new `Session.isFavorite: Bool` field. It is a clean, low-risk model add but is a NICE-TO-HAVE for v3.0 έΑΦ ship Recents (which needs only the AppSettings array) first; add the Favorites grid as section (4b) once isFavorite exists. Do not block the Dashboard on it.
result.commandPaletteSpec:
Spotlight-style έΝαK palette. CRITICAL CORRECTION to two of the three proposals: έΝαK is ALREADY FREE έΑΦ the existing shortcut in NexusCommands (NexusApp.swift line 54) is έΝαέΘπK (command+shift) for the Password Manager. NO REBIND is needed; keep έΝαέΘπK as-is.

TRIGGER έΑΦ in NexusCommands add a new CommandGroup (or after .newItem): Button('menu.command_palette') { vm.showCommandPalette = true }.keyboardShortcut('k', modifiers: .command). Add `var showCommandPalette = false` to AppViewModel.

RENDERING έΑΦ a centered .overlay on MainView gated by vm.showCommandPalette, NOT a .sheet (so it floats over the NavigationSplitView). ZStack: dimmed scrim (.ultraThinMaterial or Color.black.opacity(0.18), .ignoresSafeArea, tap-to-dismiss) + centered card 620pt wide, max 60% height, top-aligned ~120pt from top, DS.Radius.lg, .regularMaterial, hairline stroke, subtle shadow. Entrance: .scaleEffect(0.96) + .opacity(0) έΗΤ in via .spring(response:0.28, dampingFraction:0.86) (~140έΑΥ280ms material blur-in); respect reduceMotion (fade only).

LAYOUT έΑΦ top: borderless TextField (DS.Font.title) with leading magnifyingglass, @FocusState auto-focused .onAppear. Middle: scrollable LazyVStack of grouped results (PaletteResultRow, DS.Radius.md). Bottom: a ~22pt footer bar with KeyHint chips: ['έΗΣ','έΗΥ'] Navigate ┬╖ ['έΠΟ'] Open ┬╖ ['έΝξ','έΠΟ'] Connect & stay ┬╖ ['esc'] Close.

WHAT IT SEARCHES έΑΦ one ranked list built each keystroke from real model data, bucketed by `group` with SectionHeaders in fixed priority: (1) SESSIONS έΑΦ fuzzy over name+host+username+tags; έΠΟ runs vm.connect(to:), row shows StatusDot + MonoText host:port. (2) OPEN TABS έΑΦ from vm.activeSessions έΗΤ 'Switch to <tabTitle>' sets vm.selectedTabId. (3) FOLDERS έΑΦ reveal/expand in sidebar. (4) ACTIONS έΑΦ static [PaletteResult] registry: New SSH/Telnet/Serial Session, New Folder (έΝαέΘπN), Import CSV, Open Password Manager (έΝαέΘπK), Open Settings (έΝα,), Toggle Language DE/EN. Each from existing VM flags. (Macros/Servers actions added when those layers exist.)

FUZZY MATCH έΑΦ subsequence scorer fuzzyScore(query, candidate) over title+subtitle: chars in order, bonuses for consecutive runs + word-boundary/CamelCase starts + prefix + shorter target; case-insensitive; recency tiebreaker. Matched chars bolded via HighlightedText. Empty query έΗΤ open tabs first, then recents, then top actions.

KEYBOARD έΑΦ full no-mouse nav via .onKeyPress (macOS 14+, no AppKit): έΗΣ/έΗΥ move selectedIndex (wraps + auto-scroll), έΠΟ runs result.run() then dismisses, έΝξέΠΟ runs without dismiss (batch connects), esc dismisses; mouse hover also sets selectedIndex and click runs. State in @Observable PaletteModel so it's unit-testable.

CONNECT FLOW έΑΦ selecting a Session result calls the existing vm.connect(to:) (which appends a ConnectionSession + sets selectedTabId UNCHANGED), appends to vm.recentSessionIds, dismisses; the new tab + terminal appear with zero changes to the connection layer.
signatureMoves: Breathing connect pulse έΑΦ while a session is .connecting its StatusDot doesn't sit static: a halo Circle scales 1.0έΗΤ1.6 and fades (opacity 0.6έΗΤ0) on a ~0.9s repeatForever loop, so an in-progress switch login visibly breathes in both the sidebar and the tab; the instant .connected fires it does one quick .symbolEffect(.bounce) and settles to steady emerald. Auto-stills under Reduce Motion. ~15 lines of pure SwiftUI, the tactile 'it's alive' beat unique to a connection manager.

Spotlight-grade έΝαK blur-in έΑΦ the palette springs from 96% scale with the backdrop melting to material over ~280ms, the search field auto-focuses, and the first result is pre-selected so an engineer types three letters and hits έΠΟ without ever touching the mouse; matched characters bold live as you type. Reads exactly like macOS Spotlight, which network engineers already trust.

Status-at-a-glance sidebar έΑΦ every live session shows an 8pt state dot AND tints its hover-row background with a ~6% wash of the state color, so a folder of 30 switches reveals its health as a vertical color rhythm readable in peripheral vision, with zero extra labels. The dot+symbol+label encoding keeps it colorblind-safe.

On-hover row reveals έΑΦ SessionRow surfaces trailing play.fill + pencil ghost buttons only on .onHover, fading in with .easeOut(0.12), keeping the dense list clean while making connect one click away without opening a context menu.

Crafted empty states as launchpads έΑΦ every previously-blank screen (no sessions, empty recents, empty search, locked store) becomes an EmptyStateView with a 44pt hierarchical SF Symbol and a single prominent CTA that drops you straight into the flow (empty recents έΗΤ New Session; empty search έΗΤ 'Press έΠΟ to SSH to <query>' directly), turning the app's weakest screens into its most inviting ones.

featurePlan.feature: Design-system foundation έΑΦ DS.Space / DS.Radius / DS.Font / DS.Color enums + ConnectionState extension (tint/symbol/label) as the single state source of truth
featurePlan.note: Everything depends on it. The ConnectionState extension must handle the associated value (.failed(String) is non-Equatable) via a switch. Replaces 8 radii / 149 fonts / scattered paddings.

featurePlan.feature: Core reusable components έΑΦ StatusDot, StateBadge, KeyHint, SectionHeader, NexusCard, MonoText, EmptyStateView, QuickActionTile
featurePlan.note: The vocabulary the dashboard, palette and sidebar all consume. Land before any screen work.

featurePlan.feature: Status dots in sidebar SessionRow + on-hover connect/edit reveals + StatusDot/StateBadge in TabItemView
featurePlan.note: Add vm.liveState(for:). MUST preserve List(selection:), .tag(SidebarItem.session), double-tap connect έΑΦ do not regress the working sidebar. Replaces TabItemView.stateColor with state.tint.

featurePlan.feature: DashboardView replacing WelcomeView (hero/quick-connect, quick actions, stats, recents, stub server panel)
featurePlan.note: Swap only the vm.activeSessions.isEmpty branch in TerminalTabsView. Requires adding vm.recentSessionIds:[UUID] to AppSettings + append on connect.

featurePlan.feature: Command Palette (έΝαK) έΑΦ overlay, fuzzy search over sessions/tabs/folders/actions, full keyboard nav
featurePlan.note: έΝαK is already free (existing shortcut is έΝαέΘπK) έΑΦ no rebind. @Observable PaletteModel for testability. .onKeyPress (macOS 14+), no AppKit.

featurePlan.feature: Apply tokens app-wide έΑΦ fix Color.black terminal fallback (TabContentView L121), normalize all .font()/.padding()/radii, hierarchical symbol rendering, light+dark audit
featurePlan.note: The find-and-replace pass that actually cashes in the consistency win across all 24 files.

featurePlan.feature: Recent sessions persistence (recentSessionIds in AppSettings, capped/de-duped, appended on connect)
featurePlan.note: Powers Dashboard recents + palette empty-query. Smallest persistence path; AppSettings is already Codable JSON.

featurePlan.feature: Session.isFavorite + Dashboard Favorites grid (NXSessionCard) + sidebar context-menu 'Add to Favorites'
featurePlan.note: Clean model add but not required for award-grade v3.0. Ship Recents first; add Favorites as a Dashboard section once the field exists.
Power-user density control. Add to Settings; defaults compact.

featurePlan.feature: Live wiring of embedded TFTP/FTP/HTTP server status + Start/Stop in dashboard panel
featurePlan.note: No server model/service exists yet. Ship the panel as a clean 'idle' stub now; wire it when the server layer is built. Do not block v3.0 on it.
Real value for switch config pushes but orthogonal to the visual identity. Defer past the design-system + palette + dashboard core.
Cheap polish; pairs well with the breathing-dot state model. Optional.

featurePlan.feature: nexus:// URL scheme to open/connect a session
featurePlan.note: Nice automation hook; independent of the redesign.
Security hardening of the existing HKDF credential store. Belongs in its own security-focused change, not the visual v3.0.

featurePlan.feature: nexusWindowChrome() shared across 8 windows + matchedGeometry sliding tab underline + controlActiveState desaturation
featurePlan.note: HONEST CUT LINE. Only TWO scenes exist (Main + Settings) έΑΦ the '8 windows' premise is false today, so the shared-chrome modifier and per-window rollout are unbuildable as scoped. The matchedGeometry underline and focus-dim are pure polish. Revisit if/when more windows are actually added.

buildOrder: Phase 0 έΑΦ Foundation: create DesignSystem.swift with enums DS.Space, DS.Radius, DS.Font, DS.Color (all NSColor/material-backed) and the View.dsPadding helper. Add the ConnectionState extension { tint, symbol, label } handling the .failed(String) associated value via switch. This is the single state source of truth and blocks everything.

Phase 1 έΑΦ Core components: build StatusDot, StateBadge, KeyHint, SectionHeader, NexusCard, MonoText, EmptyStateView, QuickActionTile in a Components/ group. Verify each with #Preview in light + dark + Reduce Motion before consuming them.

Phase 2 έΑΦ Sidebar + tabs (lowest-risk real screen, proves no regression): refactor SessionRow's body to use StatusDot + rowIcon(16) + MonoText + on-hover reveals while keeping List(selection:), .tag(SidebarItem.session), and double-tap connect intact. Add vm.liveState(for:). Replace TabItemView.stateColor with state.tint + StatusDot. Fix the Color.black terminal fallback (TabContentView L121 έΗΤ DS.Color.surface).

Phase 3 έΑΦ Recents persistence: add recentSessionIds:[UUID] to AppSettings, append (de-dup, cap 8, move-to-front) inside vm.connect(to:), and add vm.recentSessions computed lookup. Needed by both the Dashboard and the palette.

Phase 4 έΑΦ Dashboard: build DashboardView (hero/quick-connect bar, quick actions, stats, recents, stub ServerStatusPanel) and swap it into the vm.activeSessions.isEmpty branch of TerminalTabsView, leaving the non-empty terminal path untouched.

Phase 5 έΑΦ Command Palette: add vm.showCommandPalette, the @Observable PaletteModel, the fuzzy scorer, CommandPaletteView + PaletteResultRow as a MainView .overlay, and the έΝαK Button in NexusCommands (no rebind έΑΦ έΝαK is free). Wire the Dashboard quick-connect bar to open it pre-focused.

Phase 6 έΑΦ Token sweep + polish: find-and-replace all remaining ad-hoc .font()/.padding()/cornerRadius across the 24 files to DS tokens, apply .symbolRenderingMode(.hierarchical) globally, add stagger-reveal + hover-lift motion (reduceMotion-gated), and audit light/dark/increase-contrast.

Phase 7 έΑΦ Localization + verification: add all new keys (dashboard.*, menu.command_palette, palette.*, state.*) to BOTH de and en Localizable strings, run an adversarial DE/EN string review, then build + run + screenshot to confirm zero sidebar/terminal regression.

Phase 8 έΑΦ Deferred (post-core, each independent): Session.isFavorite + Favorites grid, sidebar density toggle, snippets, connect/disconnect notifications, nexus:// URL scheme, PBKDF2 KDF migration, and live server wiring έΑΦ ship as separate follow-ups, NOT gating v3.0.
